rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the core conceptual issue and proposes a well-supported reframing, aligning with prior work.
rationale.RX.1: Flags some uncertainties but doesn't consistently mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: Identifies potential harms and suggests mitigations effectively.
rationale.RX.5: Lacks detailed traceability for all changes.
